top_signals.title: S&P 500 Weekly Streak at Risk as AI Slide Deepens: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500 is set to break a historic weekly run of gains as the artificial-intelligence trade takes another leg lower, with investors also expecting payrolls data to affirm that interest rates will stay higher for longer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Carmignac Sees Deficits Making Central Banks Inflation Tolerant
top_signals.summary: Carmignac is extending the maturity of its inflation-linked bond holdings in a bet that mounting pressure on government budgets will push central banks to tolerate higher inflation in coming years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oil Steadies After First Drop This Week on Peace Talk Optimism - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Steadies After First Drop This Week on Peace Talk Optimism  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
